# catalystcenter_device_replacement_workflow (Resource)

This resource triggers the device replacement workflow on Catalyst Center. The faulty device must already be marked for replacement (see `catalystcenter_device_replacement`). The workflow is long-running; this resource only triggers it. <p/> When this resource is destroyed or refreshed, no actions are performed on Catalyst Center.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "catalystcenter_device_replacement_workflow" "example" {
  faulty_device_serial_number      = "FOC12345678"
  replacement_device_serial_number = "FOC87654321"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `faulty_device_serial_number` (String) Serial number of the faulty device to be replaced
- `replacement_device_serial_number` (String) Serial number of the replacement device

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The id of the object
